termsContent.title: Terms and Conditions
termsContent.s1p: By using the Cavio platform, you accept these terms and conditions in full. If you do not agree with any provision, please do not use the platform.
termsContent.s2p: Cavio is an AI-powered support tool designed to assist dental professionals in analyzing dental radiographs. The platform does not replace professional clinical diagnosis.
termsContent.s3p: Results provided by the platform are indicative and must be validated by a qualified professional. The user is responsible for all clinical decisions based on the information provided.
termsContent.s4p: You are responsible for keeping your account and password confidential. Any activity performed through your account is your responsibility.
termsContent.s5p: New users receive a 7-day free trial. After the trial period, access to premium features may be restricted.
termsContent.s6p: Cavio is not responsible for clinical decisions made based on platform results. The service is provided "as is," without warranties of any kind.
termsContent.s7p: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified through the platform about significant changes.

privacyContent.title: Privacy Policy
privacyContent.s1p: We collect the following data: name, email address, organization information, and uploaded radiograph data for analysis. This data is required to provide the service.
privacyContent.s2p: Your data is used exclusively to provide and improve Cavio services. We do not sell or share personal data with third parties without your explicit consent.
privacyContent.s3p: Data is securely stored on Firebase (Google Cloud) servers. Each user can access only their own data. We implement appropriate security measures to protect information.
privacyContent.s4p: Radiographs and patient data are stored securely and are accessible only to the uploading user. We do not use patient data to train AI models without explicit consent.
privacyContent.s5p: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time. For personal data requests, contact us at our support email address.
privacyContent.s6p: The platform uses essential cookies for authentication and proper functionality. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: We collect the following data: name, email address, organization information, and uploaded radiograph data for analysis. This data is required to provide the service.
privacy.s2p: Your data is used exclusively to provide and improve Cavio services. We do not sell or share personal data with third parties without your explicit consent.
privacy.s3p: Data is securely stored on Firebase (Google Cloud) servers. Each user can access only their own data. We implement appropriate security measures to protect information.
privacy.s4p: Radiographs and patient data are stored securely and are accessible only to the uploading user. We do not use patient data to train AI models without explicit consent.
privacy.s5p: You have the right to access, modify, or delete your personal data at any time. For personal data requests, contact us at our support email address.
privacy.s6p: The platform uses essential cookies for authentication and proper functionality. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies.
privacy.s7p: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or your data, feel free to contact us.
